understanding.goal_understanding: reach the goal gem tile marked `+` while avoiding spikes; complete levels efficiently under turn limits
understanding.mechanics_understanding: horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic fall in current gravity (DOWN toward lower y) until landing; CLICK removes breakable x blocks at target_position (no movement); spikes end run; UNDO reverts last action; corridor_scan and landing previews show safe passages

understanding.goal_understanding: reach the goal gem tile marked `+` while avoiding spikes; complete levels efficiently under turn limits
understanding.mechanics_understanding: horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic fall in current gravity (DOWN toward lower y) until landing; CLICK removes breakable x blocks at target_position (no movement); spikes end run; UNDO reverts last action; corridor_scan and landing previews show safe passages
